scenes.narration: Every single day, there is a 90-minute window when the cosmos turns hostile. Starting anything new during this time invites disaster. The ancients called it Rahu Kaal.
scenes.videoPrompt: Dark cosmic void with a shadowy serpent-like form coiling through space, eclipse-like darkness consuming golden light, ominous atmosphere, cosmic dust swirling into a vortex, stars dimming one by one, dramatic camera push-in, 4K cinematic, dark and foreboding, deep purple and black color palette

scenes.narration: Rahu is not a physical planet. It is the north lunar node — the point where the Moon's orbit crosses the Sun's path. In mythology, Rahu is the severed head of the demon Svarbhanu, eternally hungry, eternally consuming.
scenes.subtitle: North Lunar Node • The Cosmic Devourer
scenes.videoPrompt: Abstract cosmic visualization of a lunar node — where the Moon's orbital plane intersects the ecliptic, two luminous orbital rings crossing in space, at their intersection point a dark vortex of shadow consuming light, ghostly purple energy spiraling inward, celestial mechanics made visible and terrifying, 4K cinematic, mystical and ominous

scenes.narration: During Rahu Kaal, the shadow planet's influence peaks. New ventures begun in this window face hidden obstacles. Contracts signed become tangled. Journeys started encounter delays. Investments made lose their timing.
scenes.textOverlay:
No new ventures
No contracts
No journeys
scenes.videoPrompt: Cosmic obstacles materializing in space — golden paths being blocked by dark shadowy barriers, light being bent and distorted by invisible gravitational forces, a journey through space encountering dark matter clouds, golden ships of light being deflected off course, time distortion visualized, 4K cinematic, tension building

scenes.narration: The timing changes every day of the week. Monday: 7:30 to 9 AM. Tuesday: 3 to 4:30 PM. Wednesday: noon to 1:30. And it shifts with sunrise — different for every city on Earth.
scenes.videoPrompt: Time-lapse of Earth rotating from space, different cities lighting up and darkening as the Sun moves, golden sundial shadows sweeping across continents, seven days cycling rapidly, clock hands spinning, each day's Rahu Kaal window highlighted as a dark band moving across the globe, 4K cinematic, rhythmic and educational

scenes.narration: But here's what most people don't know: Rahu Kaal doesn't affect work already in progress. Only new beginnings are vulnerable. And for Rahu worship itself — this is actually the MOST powerful time.
scenes.videoPrompt: Dark cosmic energy transforming into golden protective light, shadows being channeled and controlled, a meditation scene in cosmic space — figure sitting in lotus position surrounded by controlled dark energy being converted to wisdom, transformation of fear into power, 4K cinematic, empowering and mystical

scenes.narration: Millions check Rahu Kaal before signing deals, booking flights, or starting new projects. Know the shadow. Respect the shadow. Check today's Rahu Kaal — free — at Dekho Panchang.
scenes.videoPrompt: Camera slowly pulling back from dark cosmic energy to reveal a vast, serene galaxy, darkness giving way to billions of stars, golden spiral arms rotating peacefully, sense of knowledge conquering fear, warm golden light, cosmic serenity, 4K cinematic, peaceful resolution
